Name: St. Ives Compact
Description: The St. Ives Compact, a splinter of the Capellan Confederation, emerged in 3029 as a direct result of the Fourth Succession War. Duchess Candace Liao, heir apparent, defied her warmongering father and fled to the St. Ives Commonality. Aided by Federated Suns intelligence and her lover Justin Xiang Allard, she repelled Capellan loyalists and established a fragile independence. Limited military might forced the Capellans to harass the Compact through civilian attacks. With the Sun's protection, the Compact endured under Candace's firm rule, a beacon of defiance on the rimward border.
ReputationStatements: You will be paid promptly. We have learned the cost of delayed trust.
We are asking for your professionalism, not your loyalty — though both would be appreciated.
Do this cleanly. The Compact is watched more closely than it is respected.
We are not the Capellan Confederation. We simply have to survive in its shadow.
This is a matter of sovereignty, not aggression. Though the distinction may be lost on outsiders.
Your previous work spoke for itself. The Compact values your prowess and reliability.
You’ve built a reputation as a hero among the people of St Ives. That is exactly what we need.
MissionSuccessStatements: We will remember this favor. Quietly, but permanently.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: This was not the outcome we hoped for… but you did not abandon us when it mattered.
BadFaithFailureStatements: We expected risk. We did not expect abandonment. Whatever justification you have, the result is the same: we are now weaker than before.
